title: Call for motorists to exercise caution on the roads
description: EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Road Traffic...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Road Traffic Management Corporation (RTMC) has called on motorists to take extra caution when driving on the roads as icy cold weather conditions have gripped the Eastern Cape and KwaZulu-Natal.","html":"EASTERN CAPE NEWS - The Road Traffic Management Corporation (RTMC) has called on motorists to take extra caution when driving on the roads as icy cold weather conditions have gripped the Eastern Cape and KwaZulu-Natal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The South African Weather Service (SAWS) warned of widespread rain with disruptive snow over escarpments of the Eastern Cape and KwaZulu-Natal on Tuesday.","html":"The South African Weather Service (SAWS) warned of widespread rain with disruptive snow over escarpments of the Eastern Cape and KwaZulu-Natal on Tuesday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“The RTMC advises travellers in affected areas to delay their trips until the situation improves.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Travel routes are also affected with the N2 from Ingeli towards Kokstad in KwaZulu Natal being closed due to snow.","html":"Travel routes are also affected with the N2 from Ingeli towards Kokstad in KwaZulu Natal being closed due to snow."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The R58 Barkley East and West towards Barkley Pass was also closed due to snow.","html":"The R58 Barkley East and West towards Barkley Pass was also closed due to snow."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Heavy rains with strong wind were reported in Umzimkhulu and Ixopo KwaZulu Natal and this could lead to flash flooding in low lying areas. Motorists are advised to switch their headlights on to increase their visibility.","html":"Heavy rains with strong wind were reported in Umzimkhulu and Ixopo KwaZulu Natal and this could lead to flash flooding in low lying areas. Motorists are advised to switch their headlights on to increase their visibility."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please drive with extreme caution.","html":"Please drive with extreme caution."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Motorists should heed the following road safety precautions when driving on the road:"},{"type":"list","items":["Decrease your speed and leave yourself plenty of room to stop. You should allow at least three times more space than usual between you and the car in front of you.","Brake gently to avoid skidding. If your wheels start to lock up, ease off the brake.","Turn on your lights to increase your visibility to other motorists.","Keep your lights and windshield clean.","Use low gears to keep traction, especially on hills.","Do not use cruise control or overdrive on icy roads.","Be especially careful on bridges, overpasses and infrequently travelled roads, which will freeze first. Even at temperatures above freezing, if the conditions are wet, you might encounter ice in shady areas or on exposed roadways like bridges.","Do not pass snow ploughs and sanding trucks. The drivers have limited visibility, and you are likely to find the road in front of them worse than the road behind.","Do not assume your vehicle can handle all conditions. Even four-wheel and front-wheel drive vehicles can encounter trouble on winter roads. - SAnews.gov.za"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
